full_text:
Zhang Gu (Yuan’an) 張固 (元安)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Gu (張固), styledYuan’an (元安). He was similar to his father in demeanor, but died early. Zhang Gu was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
